name_en: Wisteria Purple 🎉Prada new nylon Hobo handbag/crossbody 😘😘 viral among internet influencers and popular in the fashion circle! Hobo is out with a new style! 👏👏 This Hobo bag design is amazing 👍👍 Multi-use 😘😘 waist bag/shoulder bag/crossbody 👍👍 Handle replaced with chain, adds a touch of sexiness as a shoulder bag, also comes with a long strap, love that the strap has a small charm (mini bag), can also hang other bags or on the waist as an accessory 🙊🙊 Goes with any outfit 😘😘 girls hurry up, it's so beautiful 🙊🙊 Model: 1BH204, Dimensions: L22xH12xW6cm
